--- all_different.sql
ALL_DIFFERENT(a, b, c)

--- AST
&ast.CallExpr{
  Rparen: 21,
  Func:   &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NameEnd: 13,
        Name:    "ALL_DIFFERENT",
      },
    },
  },
  Args: []ast.Arg{
    &ast.ExprArg{
      Expr: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 14,
        NameEnd: 15,
        Name:    "a",
      },
    },
    &ast.ExprArg{
      Expr: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 17,
        NameEnd: 18,
        Name:    "b",
      },
    },
    &ast.ExprArg{
      Expr: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 20,
        NameEnd: 21,
        Name:    "c",
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
ALL_DIFFERENT(a, b, c)
